creator: pcm@pogotopia.net
text:
Created attachment 175075
poudriere testport logs and thruk.shar

Hi,

Thruk is a multibackend monitoring webinterface which currently supports Naemon, Nagios, Icinga and Shinken as backend using the Livestatus API.

After some weeks i got a working port of www.thruk.org. It's configured to run be used with net-mgmt/naemon but other backands could also be used.

portlint -AC:
WARN: /usr/ports/www/thruk/pkg-message: possible use of absolute pathname "/var/spool/naemon/li...".
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.

I've attached the poudriere testport logs and also the thruk.shar.

Cheers,
Daniel Schossig
